ratchets.ci_check: grep -r 'console\.log' --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' packages/ apps/ src/ lib/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'node_modules\|dist\|__tests__\|\.test\.\|\.spec\.' | wc -l | tr -d ' '
ratchets.description: console.log statements in non-test source files

ratchets.ci_check: grep -r 'as any' --include='*.ts' packages/ apps/ src/ lib/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'node_modules\|dist\|__tests__\|\.test\.\|\.spec\.' | wc -l | tr -d ' '
grep -r '@ts-ignore\|@ts-expect-error' --include='*.ts' packages/ apps/ src/ lib/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'node_modules\|dist' | wc -l | tr -d ' '
grep -r 'it\.skip\|it\.todo\|test\.skip\|test\.todo\|xit\|xdescribe' --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' packages/ apps/ src/ lib/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'node_modules\|dist' | wc -l | tr -d ' '
grep -rn 'catch\s*(.*)\s*{\s*}' --include='*.ts' packages/ apps/ src/ lib/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'node_modules\|dist' | wc -l | tr -d ' '
ratchets.description: Silent empty catch blocks that swallow errors
